headline: Stay updated with the S&P500 stocks that are on the move in today's pre-market session.
summary: The US market is yet to commence its session on Wednesday, but let's get a preview of the pre-market session and explore the top S&P500 gainers and losers driving the early market movements.

headline: Assessing Corning (GLW) Valuation After OFC 2026 AI Data Center Connectivity Showcase
summary: Corning (GLW) is back in focus after its OFC 2026 showcase of AI data center connectivity products, including multicore fiber, high density micro cables, and expanded beam ferrules developed with partners such as US Conec. See our latest analysis for Corning. The recent AI data center announcements have coincided with a sharp shift in sentiment, with Corning’s share price delivering a 58.4% 90 day return and a very large 3 year total shareholder return, while the 1 year total shareholder...

headline: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Climb As Inflation And Energy Jitters Linger
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Wednesday, Mar, 25 2026 US stock futures are pointing higher this morning, with E mini S&P 500 contracts up about 1% and Nasdaq 100 futures ahead by a little more than 1%. The backdrop is a mix of easing geopolitical worry and stubborn inflation risk. US 10 year Treasury yields are around 4.4%, which is relatively high and reflects worries that interest rates may stay elevated, especially as energy costs keep pressure on prices. headline: Iran Puts a Match to Oil Markets as Wall Street's Tech Giants Buckle Under Rate Pressure
summary: Oil crossed back above $100 a barrel as Iran–US diplomacy showed its cracks, a climbing 10-year yield hammered the tech sector, and fresh redemption gates at two of the largest private credit funds raised uncomfortable questions about liquidity in a $1.8 trillion market. Tuesday delivered more than enough to keep investors on their toes heading into Wednesday's session.

headline: Corning (GLW) Jumps 8% on AI Optimism, Ahead of Dividends
summary: Corning Inc. (NYSE:GLW) is one of the 10 Stocks Grabbing Investor Attention Today. Corning rallied for a second day on Tuesday, jumping 8.43 percent to finish at $142.01 apiece, as investors loaded portfolios in technology stocks benefitting largely from the booming AI, while fleeing industries seen as vulnerable to the ongoing tensions in the Middle […]
